mapper.select: SELECT su.id AS id, su.space_id AS spaceId, su.user_id AS userId, u.username AS username, u.realname AS realname, d.id AS departId, d.depart_name AS departName, r.role_name AS roleNames, TO_CHAR(su.create_time, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss') AS createTime FROM dam_space_user su LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON su.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN sys_depart d ON u.orgunit = d.id LEFT JOIN sys_user_role ur ON u.id = ur.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_role r ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE su.space_id = #{spaceId} ORDER BY su.create_time DESC

SELECT u.id AS id, u.username AS username, u.realname AS realname, r.role_name AS roleNames FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_user_role ur ON u.id = ur.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_role r ON ur.role_id = r.id
u.del_flag = 0 AND u.status = '1'
AND u.security <= #{maxDataSecurity}
AND u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{username}, '%')
AND u.realname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{realname}, '%')
AND u.orgunit = #{departId}
AND u.id NOT IN ( SELECT su2.user_id FROM dam_space_user su2 WHERE su2.space_id = #{spaceId} )
AND u.username NOT IN ('sysadmin', 'secadmin', 'secaudit', 'admin', '_reserve_user_external')
ORDER BY u.username
